_comment: EXAMPLE LABEL ONLY — not part of the acceptance corpus. Copy this shape when labeling real PDFs. Place real labels next to their .pdf file as <pdfname>.label.json.
notes_for_grader: Clean modern NI 43-101 from a 2023 SEDAR+ filing. 17-section TOC structure intact. Section 14 (resource estimate) spans pp. 89-104 with 12 grade-tonnage tables. Figures pp. 110-130 are rasterized but have selectable text captions. Expected to pass through native pdfminer.six + pdfplumber path with no OCR invoked.
